description_long: This doll features a whimsical, anime-inspired design with long teal twin-tails, a white beret adorned with a flower, and a teal and white dress with puffed sleeves and a voluminous skirt. The face is expressive, with large teal eyes, a small mouth, and a gentle smile, giving it a cheerful and inviting appearance. The dress is accented with a blue sash, a large bow at the back, and gold buttons near the hem. The doll wears teal shoes with ankle straps and white socks, matching the overall color scheme. The hands are delicately sculpted, with one hand raised near the chest and the other relaxed at the side. The overall aesthetic is elegant and playful, suitable for display or imaginative play in urban environments.
description: A cheerful, anime-style doll with long teal twin-tails, a white beret, and a teal and white dress with gold accents and matching shoes. The doll has a friendly expression and detailed accessories, exuding a whimsical, elegant charm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, detailed dress, beret, and both arms, with the right hand raised near the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered skirt, and the long flowing twin-tails extending behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the beret, the large bow, the full length of the twin-tails, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the right arm raised, and the detailed flow of the hair and skirt.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a fantasy-inspired, Lolita-style outfit featuring a white beret with a flower, a teal bolero jacket with puffed sleeves, a voluminous white skirt with gold buttons, a blue sash, and teal ankle-strap shoes with white socks. The look is accessorized with a large bow at the back and floral accents, evoking a playful, elegant, and whimsical aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with the head facing forward, the right arm bent and raised near the chest, the left arm relaxed at the side, and both legs straight. The torso is upright, and the long twin-tails flow down the back.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a smiling expression with wide, open eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small, upturned mouth, conveying a cheerful and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight teal hair styled in twin-tails, secured with hairbands, and extending well past the waist with some layered, pointed ends.
